title: platform done task card references
purpose: D6.3 defines platform done task card references for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse.
scope: Owns `D6.3` only; siblings under `D6` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §6 — Branch D — Platform evolution plane (parallel queue)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#6-branch-d-platform-evolution-plane-parallel-queue).
behavior_steps: Before marking platform promotion done, audit confirms at least one task card—or playbook procedure consumed by task cards—references the promoted artifact in Components, Test command, or `allowed_reads`.
Playbook-keeper adds reference guidance when capturing patterns from a source task so future implement turns exercise the tool under evidence gates.
Orphan scripts unused by pursuit are platform debt; promotion without a reference fails D6.3 and reopens the queue item.
Reference closes the loop from product repetition to reusable tooling back to product per [C3.1](C3.1-task-cards-components-promotion-note.md) promotion_note intent.
If no task card or playbook procedure cites the artifact, pursuit blocks platform done at H2 until a template or active card is updated and dual-written.

Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Platform queue depth 0 but product blocked on missing playbook â€” D3.3 priority cut skips platform drain.
Edge case `D6.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `D6.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Scheduler in autopilot workflow: `(steps_total % K) == 0` â†’ platform turn.
playbook-keeper + script extraction skills dequeue promotion items.
Validate `D6.3` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `D6.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `D6.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: D6.3 defines platform done task card references for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse. In practice, the system before marking platform promotion done, audit confirms at least one task card—or playbook procedure consumed by task cards—references the promoted artifact in components, test command, or `allowed_reads`, then playbook-keeper adds reference guidance when capturing patterns from a source task so future implement turns exercise the tool under evidence gates.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-d 2026-06-28 -->

At least one task card—or playbook procedure consumed by task cards—must reference the promoted artifact so future implement turns exercise it under evidence gates. Orphan scripts unused by pursuit are platform debt, not maturity.

Reference can be Components field, Test command, or explicit allowed_reads entry on a template task card. Playbook-keeper should add reference guidance when capturing patterns from a source task. D6.3 closes the loop from product repetition to reusable tooling back to product—without reference, promotion did not enter the delivery loop and [C3.1](C3.1-task-cards-components-promotion-note.md) promotion_note intent is unfulfilled.
